title: Implement intensive production systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement intensive production systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for production operations

pcs.text: Identify and obtain documents within the workplace that detail the requirements of the production program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and obtain documents within the workplace that detail the requirements of the production program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and obtain documents within the workplace that detail the requirements of the production program.

pcs.text: Assess and calculate the resources required for the production operations from the product to be produced, the available timelines, the available resources, and the types of housing and feeding infrastructure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and calculate the resources required for the production operations from the product to be produced, the available timelines, the available resources, and the types of housing and feeding infrastructure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and calculate the resources required for the production operations from the product to be produced, the available timelines, the available resources, and the types of housing and feeding infrastructure.

pcs.text: Determine measurable indicators, specifications and targets based on the production program and type of housing and feeding infrastructure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine measurable indicators, specifications and targets based on the production program and type of housing and feeding infrastructure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine measurable indicators, specifications and targets based on the production program and type of housing and feeding infrastructure.

pcs.text: Hold discussions with operational personnel and management to discuss the production program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Hold discussions with operational personnel and management to discuss the production program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Hold discussions with operational personnel and management to discuss the production program.

pcs.text: Identify, seek and obtain approvals required for the production operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, seek and obtain approvals required for the production operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, seek and obtain approvals required for the production operations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for production operations

elements.title: Communicate production program and complete administration activities

pcs.text: Coordinate, schedule and communicate materials and equipment requirements according to the prepared plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Coordinate, schedule and communicate materials and equipment requirements according to the prepared plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Coordinate, schedule and communicate materials and equipment requirements according to the prepared plan.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Communicate details of the procedures, tools and personal protective equipment to be used, and records to be kept with operational personnel and seek confirmation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate details of the procedures, tools and personal protective equipment to be used, and records to be kept with operational personnel and seek confirmation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate details of the procedures, tools and personal protective equipment to be used, and records to be kept with operational personnel and seek confirmation.

pcs.text: Complete documentation and records according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete documentation and records according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete documentation and records according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Provide advice to operational personnel and contractors during production operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide advice to operational personnel and contractors during production operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide advice to operational personnel and contractors during production operations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Communicate production program and complete administration activities

elements.title: Manage livestock and production environment

pcs.text: Monitor livestock for signs of ill health or injuries, and record and report observations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor livestock for signs of ill health or injuries, and record and report observations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor livestock for signs of ill health or injuries, and record and report observations.

pcs.text: Monitor housing and feeding infrastructure for signs of damage, wear and tear, and record and report observations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor housing and feeding infrastructure for signs of damage, wear and tear, and record and report observations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor housing and feeding infrastructure for signs of damage, wear and tear, and record and report observations.

pcs.text: Supervise examination of dead livestock for evidence of disease through correct post-mortem techniques and seek veterinary advice if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Supervise examination of dead livestock for evidence of disease through correct post-mortem techniques and seek veterinary advice if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Supervise examination of dead livestock for evidence of disease through correct post-mortem techniques and seek veterinary advice if required.

pcs.text: Assess and evaluate disease status of livestock, notify or report to appropriate personnel and seek veterinary assistance if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and evaluate disease status of livestock, notify or report to appropriate personnel and seek veterinary assistance if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and evaluate disease status of livestock, notify or report to appropriate personnel and seek veterinary assistance if required.

pcs.text: Monitor components of biosecurity procedures according to regulatory and industry standards and requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor components of biosecurity procedures according to regulatory and industry standards and requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor components of biosecurity procedures according to regulatory and industry standards and requirements.

pcs.text: Monitor and adjust aspects of the production system environment according to the production program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and adjust aspects of the production system environment according to the production program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and adjust aspects of the production system environment according to the production program.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Manage livestock and production environment

elements.title: Manage effluent and waste

pcs.text: Monitor effluent storage and disposal systems according to production program and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor effluent storage and disposal systems according to production program and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor effluent storage and disposal systems according to production program and manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Calculate, monitor and document volume and type of effluent
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate, monitor and document volume and type of effluent?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate, monitor and document volume and type of effluent.

pcs.text: Monitor the removal of waste and debris from the production environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor the removal of waste and debris from the production environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor the removal of waste and debris from the production environment.

pcs.text: Provide ongoing production environment maintenance program throughout all seasons
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide ongoing production environment maintenance program throughout all seasons?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide ongoing production environment maintenance program throughout all seasons.

pcs.text: Monitor and report on the regulatory and legislative requirements associated with the production program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and report on the regulatory and legislative requirements associated with the production program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and report on the regulatory and legislative requirements associated with the production program.

elements.title: Monitor and adjust production operations

pcs.text: Monitor operational tasks to ensure compliance with production plan and safe work practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor operational tasks to ensure compliance with production plan and safe work practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor operational tasks to ensure compliance with production plan and safe work practices.

pcs.text: Monitor production operations to ensure that environment regulatory requirements are being observed and followed

pcs.text: Check that all workplace documentation and records are completed according to workplace, regulatory and industry requirements

pcs.text: Take corrective action where required

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take corrective action where required.

pcs.text: Collate and store documentation and records according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collate and store documentation and records according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collate and store documentation and records according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Review and document recommended changes to production program for future implementation

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and document recommended changes to production program for future implementation.
